name: Dewald Visser
role: Creative Systems Builder, Growth Marketer, Designer
heroPosition: I turn brand, marketing, web and practical AI work into usable systems: campaigns that ship, websites that convert and workflows teams can actually run.
aboutHeadline: A creative systems builder across brand, marketing, web and AI enablement - built for teams that need the thinking and the making in one place.
aboutBody: Founder of Sun Paper and Coatings, with a background that runs through sales, Adobe-led production, WordPress and Shopify builds, education campaigns, live multimedia and practical AI adoption. I connect strategy, design and operations so ideas become useful systems, not loose assets.
